arguments.query: Everbrook Regional Airport official operator authority

stages.purpose: Resolve the authoritative organization while rejecting the secondary distractor.
Search within the resolved organization's corpus for a primary source.
Fetch the primary document instead of treating its snippet as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report 17 March 2014 as the opening date and cite the fetched authority page.
Do not substitute the construction-completion or first-flight date.

prompt: Identify the public authority that operates Everbrook Regional Airport, then fetch its primary terminal history and report the opening date of Terminal C. Do not infer the construction-completion or first-flight dates.

search_1.query: Everbrook Regional Airport official operator authority

results.title: Summary of Terminal C: Project History

fetch_1.title: Terminal C: Project History
fetch_1.content: Construction concluded in February 2014. Terminal C opened to passengers on 17 March 2014, and its first international departure followed the next day.
